# agency_cd     Agency code
# site_no       USGS site number
# site_tp_cd    Site type code
# lev_dt        Date level measured
# lev_tm        Time level measured
# lev_tz_cd     Time datum
# lev_va        Water-level value in feet below land surface
# sl_lev_va     Water-level value in feet above specific vertical datum
# sl_datum_cd   Referenced vertical datum
# lev_status_cd Status
# lev_agency_cd Measuring agency
# lev_dt_acy_cd Water-level date-time accuracy
# lev_acy_cd    Water-level accuracy
# lev_src_cd    Source of measurement
# lev_meth_cd   Method of measurement
# lev_age_cd    Water-level approval status
# parameter_cd  Parameter code
#
# Referenced agency codes (lev_agency_cd) included in this output:
#
#     ""         Not determined
#     NE021      Central Platte Natural Resources District, NE
#     USGS       U.S. Geological Survey

#     NGVD29     National Geodetic Vertical Datum of 1929
#
# Referenced water-level site status codes (lev_status_cd) included in this output:
#
#     1          Static
#
# Referenced water-level date-time accuracy codes (lev_dt_acy_cd) included in this output:
#
#     D          Date is accurate to the Day
#     m          Date is accurate to the Minute
#
# Referenced water-level accuracy codes (lev_acy_cd) included in this output:
#
#     1          Water level accuracy to nearest tenth of a foot
#     2          Water level accuracy to nearest hundredth of a foot
#
# Referenced source of measurement codes (lev_src_cd) included in this output:
#
#     ""         Not determined
#     A          Reported by another government agency (do not use "A" if reported by owner, use "O").
#     S          Measured by personnel of reporting agency.
#
# Referenced method of measurement codes (lev_meth_cd) included in this output:
#
#     B          Analog or graphic recorder.
#     O          Observed.
#     S          Steel-tape measurement.
#     T          Electric-tape measurement.
#     V          Calibrated electric-tape measurement.
#     Z          Other.
#
# Referenced water-level approval-status codes (lev_age_cd) included in this output:
#
#     A          Approved for publication -- Processing and review completed.
